title: Minky Sure Grip Iron Holder With Strong And Secure Strip, Heat Resistant Iron Holder, Wall or Door Mounted, Iron Holder For Standard Irons With Cable Management, Fixings Included
features: Safely stores your iron without having to wait for it to cool down
Space saving design - maximise available storage space
Dimensions: L17cm x W15.8cm x W30.5cm; Silicone strap measures - 37.5cm
Cable management - Simply wrap cable around to store
description: From the manufacturer Minky Homecare Established in the UK in 1941, Minky Homecare are one of the world leaders in laundry hardware and textile manufacture. We are the proud holders of both the Royal Warrant, granted as a supplier of high quality products to the Royal Household and the Princes Warrant, awarded for product quality and a commitment to the environment. Feature packed Fits all steam irons – the Sure Grip silicone strap can be adjusted to fit any standard steam iron Wall or door mounted Compact space saving design Sure Grip Iron Holder The Minky Sure Grip Iron Holder is a heat resistant iron holder that fits all standard steam irons. Featuring an adjustable silicone strap, the Sure Grip Iron Holder delivers a safe and secure storage solution to store your iron immediately after use, providing complete peace of mind. Cable Management – Simply wrap the iron cable for a neat storage solution Store away your hot iron neatly and safely with the Sure Grip Iron Holder. Secure Strap The adjustable strap secures the iron in place within the holder and is made from a durable silicone to ensure a super long life. Cable Management The Minky Sure Grip Iron Holder features a cable management zone so the flex of the iron can be wrapped around the base of the holder neatly. Heat Resistant The heat proof material used in the iron holder delivers a safe and secure storage solution to store your iron immediately after use. Manufactured in the UK Like many of our products, the Minky Sure Grip Iron Holder is manufactured and assembled in the UK to the highest levels of quality and standards.
